modules.title: Today's Weather
modules.summary: Clear conditions expected with a maximum temperature of 20°C. Light winds throughout the day. Low chance of rainfall at 20%.

modules.title: Fire Danger & Safety
modules.summary: Open Burning Period (Unrestricted) is currently active. No permit required for open-air fires. Always verify local wind and weather conditions before lighting fires and ensure proper supervision and extinguishing equipment.
bullet_points: No permit required for open-air fires today
Always verify local wind and daily weather conditions before ignition
Ensure an adult is present and extinguishing equipment is handy
